case_title: DENISE FLINN VS. ANTONIO CASTELLUCCI et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF APR-09-2012 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
